responsibilities: Support development of annual strategic plans by analyzing market trends, competitive positioning, and growth opportunities
Conduct competitive intelligence research to track peer company strategies, performance, and emerging market threats
Build financial models to evaluate strategic initiatives including new market entry, product launches, and partnerships
Prepare board and executive committee materials summarizing strategic priorities, performance metrics, and key recommendations
Partner with business unit leaders to translate corporate strategy into actionable functional and divisional plans
Analyze industry benchmarks and best practices to identify opportunities for operational and strategic improvement
Support evaluation of potential M&A targets and strategic partnerships aligned with corporate growth objectives
Track execution of strategic initiatives against milestones, flagging risks and recommending corrective actions
